description: Create a technical block diagram of the Transformer (Encoder-Decoder) neural network architecture in draw.io Desktop using the specification provided at '~/Desktop/transformer_spec.txt'. The diagram should consist of two main stacks: ENCODER (left) and DECODER (right), incorporating all layers described in the specification, including Input/Output Embeddings, Positional Encoding, Multi-Head Attention, Masked Multi-Head Attention, Feed Forward, Linear, and Softmax. Include 'Add & Norm' residual connections around the sub-layers and label the repeating stacks with 'Nx' to indicate depth. Ensure all text labels match the terms in the specification exactly (e.g., 'Multi-Head Attention', 'Add & Norm'). Save the diagram as '~/Desktop/transformer_arch.drawio' and export it as a PNG image to '~/Desktop/transformer_arch.png'.
